1 / 12
Baba Yetu
Sala ya Bwana • The Lord's Prayer
Press play to advance automatically,
or use the arrows to go at your own pace.
2 / 12
Kwa jina la Baba,
la Mwana,
na Roho Mtakatifu.
Amina.
kwah JEE-nah lah BAH-bah / lah MWAH-nah
nah ROH-hoh m-tah-kah-TEE-foo / ah-MEE-nah

In the name of the Father, the Son,
and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
3 / 12
Baba yetu uliye mbinguni,
BAH-bah YEH-too oo-LEE-yeh mbeen-GOO-nee

Our Father who art in heaven,
4 / 12
Jina lako litukuzwe.
JEE-nah LAH-koh lee-too-KOOZ-weh

Hallowed be Your name.
5 / 12
Ufalme wako uje.
oo-FAL-meh WAH-koh OO-jeh

Your kingdom come.
6 / 12
Mapenzi yako yafanyike,
hapa duniani kama huko mbinguni.
mah-PEN-zee YAH-koh yah-fah-NYEE-keh
HAH-pah doo-nee-AH-nee KAH-mah HOO-koh mbeen-GOO-nee

Your will be done, here on earth as it is up in heaven.
7 / 12
Utupe leo mkate wetu wa kila siku.
oo-TOO-peh LEH-oh m-KAH-teh WEH-too wah KEE-lah SEE-koo

Give us this day our daily bread.
8 / 12
Utusamehe makosa yetu,
kama sisi tunavyowasamehe
wale wanaotukosea.
oo-too-sah-MEH-heh mah-KOH-sah YEH-too
KAH-mah SEE-see too-nah-VYOH-wah-sah-MEH-heh WAH-leh wah-nah-oh-too-KOH-seh-ah

Forgive us our sins, as we forgive those who sin against us.
9 / 12
Usitutie katika majaribu,
bali utuokoe na yule mwovu.
oo-see-TOO-tee-eh kah-TEE-kah mah-jah-REE-boo
BAH-lee oo-too-OH-koh-eh nah YOO-leh MWOH-voo

Lead us not into temptation,
but deliver us from the evil one.
10 / 12
Kwa maana ufalme ni wako,
na nguvu, na utukufu,
hata milele na milele.
kwah mah-AH-nah oo-FAL-meh nee WAH-koh
nah N-GOO-voo, nah oo-too-KOO-foo / HAH-tah mee-LEH-leh nah mee-LEH-leh

For Yours is the kingdom, the power and the glory, forever and ever.
11 / 12
Amina.
ah-MEE-nah

Amen.
12 / 12
Kwa jina la Baba,
la Mwana,
na Roho Mtakatifu.
Amina.
kwah JEE-nah lah BAH-bah / lah MWAH-nah
nah ROH-hoh m-tah-kah-TEE-foo / ah-MEE-nah

In the name of the Father, the Son,
and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
100%
